agitation.note: Prewet >=1 min. Agitate softly but continuously for 30 s, then 10 s every minute.

agitation.note: Prewet >=1 min. Agitate softly but continuously for 30 s, then 10 s every minute.

agitation.note: Machine process (continuous / hanger-dip). Standard time is for a suitable processor under controlled conditions.

notes: Official Fujifilm Professional Data Guide, Process CR-56 Standard Processing Steps: First Developer (H1) 6:00 at 38.0+/-0.3 C (100.4 F). E-6 chemicals may be used in place of CR-56. Film datasheet specifies Process E-6/CR-56/C6R.

agitation.note: Minilab/roller-transport machine process; standard time for a suitable processor under controlled conditions.

notes: Official Fujifilm Professional Data Guide, Process CN-16 (CN-16FA/L/S) Standard Processing Steps: Color Developer (N1) 3:05 at 38.0+/-0.2 C (100.4 F).
